content: Use Uber dark theme color system with CSS variables in global.css for light/dark theme support

description: Tailwind CSS v4 PostCSS plugin moved to separate package causing build errors
resolution: Use @tailwindcss/postcss instead of tailwindcss in postcss.config.js, and @import 'tailwindcss' in CSS

content: Complete migration from Material Design 3 to Uber dark theme: surfaces are black (#000, #121212, #1E1E1E), primary is Uber green (#06C167), text is white/white-70, shadows use uber-sm/md/lg/xl

name: Uber Design System Migration
description: Systematic sed-based replacement: bg-surface→bg-black, text-on-surface→text-white, bg-primary-container→bg-[#06C167], bg-surface-container-*→bg-white/5 or bg-white/10, text-on-surface-variant→text-white/70. Result: 0 Material classes remaining across 7 files, 67+ replacements
